text: Contractor is interested in a safe construction operation, free from hazards which might cause accidents, injuries or illnesses. In order to promote a safe, harmonious working environment and efficient work on this project, subcontractors and their employees must follow these rules at all times.  If  Subcontractor  personnel  breaks  a  rule,  they  may  be  disciplined  or  removed  from  the project. Persons who are removed from the project for breaking project rules may not be allowed to  work on this project  and depending on the severity may not be allowed to work on any of Contractors present or future projects.
